stages.name: pipeline_artifact_validation
stages.evidence: scripts/check_pipeline_artifacts.py reuses the project-owned subset validator (scripts/validate_task_system.py) to validate the committed artifacts/pipeline tree (0 violations) and self-tests against test/fixtures/pipeline/ci_artifacts: the valid tree passes and both invalid cases are rejected -- context_unknown_field (additionalProperties:false on zentinel.pipeline.context.v1) and lock_task_id_mismatch (active lock task_id 999 != directory 064). Diagnostics are project-relative and sorted. The exit-1 failure path was proven in isolation (a wrongly-passing invalid case and a broken valid tree both exit 1); the usage-error path exits 2.

stages.name: ci_entrypoint_contract
stages.evidence: scripts/ci.sh --list now emits, in order, format_check, build, unit_tests, task_system_validation, pipeline_artifact_validation, advisory_dogfood; the new stage runs python3 scripts/check_pipeline_artifacts.py between task_system_validation and advisory_dogfood. The entrypoint stays network-free.

stages.name: unit_tests
stages.evidence: no Zig source changed (src/** and test/**/*.zig are forbidden for this task); the full Zig test suite is unaffected and remains green.

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: task 064 changes only the CI script, a CI checker script, JSON fixtures, and CI/pipeline docs; no product code changed, so mutation testing is not applicable. The final release dogfood gate is task 085.

residual_risk: The CI pipeline-artifact check validates pipeline metadata artifacts (handoffs, active locks, context packets) against the baseline pipeline schemas; verification/report.json and dogfood reports are validated elsewhere (task_system_validation and the dogfood stages), so this stage intentionally does not re-validate them.

check_pipeline_artifacts.py imports scripts/validate_task_system.py to reuse the single project-owned subset validator rather than duplicating schema logic; this keeps one source of truth but means the CI check depends on that module remaining importable (guarded by its __main__ block).
No hosted CI provider configuration or remote artifact upload was added (non-goals); scripts/ci.sh remains the canonical in-repository, network-free entrypoint.
